zh.lifeSummary: 當Michael de Poynings於1318年出生在英國素福爾可布勒斯 聖 瑪麗時，他的父親Thomas de Poynings25歲，母親Agnes Rokesley19歲。他於1348年之前與Joane de Rokesley結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1338年登記服兵役。他於1345年被列為member of parliament。他去世於1369年3月7日在英國英格蘭素可波尼斯享年51歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可克萊爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Michael de Poynings于1318年出生在英国素福爾可布勒斯 聖 瑪麗时，他的父亲Thomas de Poynings25岁，母亲Agnes Rokesley19岁。他于1348年之前与Joane de Rokesley结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1338年登记服兵役。他于1345年被列为member of parliament。他去世于1369年3月7日在英国英格兰素可波尼斯享年51岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可克萊爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Michael
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of a common biblical name (meaning ‘who is like God?’ in Hebrew) borne by one of the archangels, the protector of the ancient Hebrews, who is also regarded as a saint of the Catholic Church. In the Middle Ages, Michael was regarded as captain of the heavenly host (see Revelation 12:7–9), symbol of the Church Militant, and patron of soldiers. He was often depicted bearing a flaming sword. The name is also borne by a Persian prince and ally of Belshazzar mentioned in the Book of Daniel. Since the early 1900s it has been one of the most enduringly popular boys' names in the English-speaking world.  See also  Michal .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Michael de Poynings was born in 1318, in Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, England, his father, Thomas de Poynings, was 25 and his mother, Agnes Rokesley, was 19. He married Joane de Rokesley before 1348. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He registered for military service in 1338. In 1345, his occupation is listed as member of parliament. He died on 7 March 1369, in Poynings, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 51, and was buried in Clare, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Michael de Poynings est né en 1318, à Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Poynings, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Agnes Rokesley, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Joane de Rokesley avant 1348. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1338. En 1345, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament. Il est décédé le 7 mars 1369, à Poynings, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Clare, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Michael de Poynings 1318 in Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de Poynings 25 und seine Mutter Agnes Rokesley 19. Er hat vor 1348 Joane de Rokesley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er hat sich 1338 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1345 ist sein Beruf als member of parliament aufgeführt. Er starb am 7. März 1369 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Poynings, Sussex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Clare, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Michael de Poynings è nato il nel 1318 nel Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Thomas de Poynings, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Rokesley, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Joane de Rokesley prima del 1348. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1338. Nel 1345, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament. Morì il 7 marzo 1369, nel Poynings, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Clare, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Michael de Poyningsが1318年にイギリススフォルクブレス サイント マリーで生まれた時，父Thomas de Poyningsは25歳，母Agnes Rokesleyは19歳であった。1348年以前にJoane de Rokesleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1338年に兵役登録をした。1345年，職業はmember of parliamentと記録されている。彼は1369年3月7日にイギリスイギリススセックスポイニングズで51歳で死去し，イギリススフォルククラーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Michael de Poynings(이)가 1318년 영국 수폴크 버스 세인트 메리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Poynings(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Rokesley(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1348년 이전 Joane de Rokesley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1338년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1345년, 그의 직업은 member of parliament이었다. 그는 1369년 3월 7일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 포이닝스에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 클래르에 묻혔다.

mn.Slaugham, Sussex, England: Slaugham, Sūþsēaxe, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Michael de Poynings nasceu em 1318, em Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Poynings, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Rokesley, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Joane de Rokesley antes 1348. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1338. Em 1345, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament. Ele faleceu em 7 de março de 1369, em Poynings, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Clare, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Michael de Poynings родился в 1318 г. в местности буресь сеинт мэри, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas de Poynings было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Rokesley, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Joane de Rokesley перед 1348 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. В 1338 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1345 годуработал по профессии member of parliament. Он умер 7 марта 1369 г. в местности поинингс, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности клар, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Michael de Poynings nació en 1318, en Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas de Poynings, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Agnes Rokesley, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Joane de Rokesley antes de 1348. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1338. En 1345, su ocupación registrada era member of parliament. Murió el 7 de marzo de 1369, en Poynings, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Clare, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
